_comment: Snapshot of the AIBQ2 BLF configuration used in the NeurIPS 2026 paper (Table 10). agg_method=shrink-std-aibq2 reflects the post-hoc aggregation column scored in the paper's AIBQ2 results, with hardcoded (f=0.3, c=0.7) chosen during paper development to approximate what shrink-std-loo would select on AIBQ2. Predict-time aggregation falls back to logit-mean for any non-plain-mean method (LOO/std variants need labels); the canonical paper score comes from forecasts_aggregated[shrink-std-aibq2:5] computed by aggregate.py.
name: pro-high-brave-c0-t0
